observability-studio.sharedObserverUrl.markdownDescription: Optional shared `obstudio` base URL or `/mcp` URL override. When unset, the extension reuses or starts `obstudio` on the fixed shared endpoint `http://127.0.0.1:3000`.

observability-studio.localObserverPort.markdownDescription: Local Observer UI and MCP port used when `observability-studio.sharedObserverUrl` is unset.

observability-studio.localOtlpHttpPort.markdownDescription: Local OTLP/HTTP receiver port used when `observability-studio.sharedObserverUrl` is unset.

observability-studio.localOtlpGrpcPort.markdownDescription: Local OTLP/gRPC receiver port used when `observability-studio.sharedObserverUrl` is unset.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node build-observer.js && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node build-observer.js && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
scripts.test:unit: npm run compile-tests && node --test --experimental-test-coverage out/test/extension.test.js out/test/webview-html.test.js out/test/observer-lifecycle.test.js
scripts.test:integration: tsc --outDir out --rootDir src --module Node16 --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop src/test/extension-integration.test.ts && node --test out/test/extension-integration.test.js
scripts.test:host: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && vscode-test --run out/test/extension-vscode.test.js --fail-zero --timeout 30000
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:host
